repair.name: Wooden Patches
repair.description: Add 150 points of temporary durability and absorb damage.

repair.name: Iron Patches
repair.description: Add 250 points of temporary durability and absorb damage.

repair.name: Bronze Patches
repair.description: Add 400 points of temporary durability and absorb damage.
repair.restriction: Available on ships of rate 3 and above

repair.name: Wreckage Patches
repair.description: Instantly add 200 points of temporary durability and absorb damage.
repair.restriction: Available on ships of rate 3 and above

repair.name: Wooden Repair Kit
repair.description: Repairs 100 durability pts. and 8% of sail pts. During repairs, your ship takes increased damage!

repair.name: Iron Repair Kit
repair.description: Repairs 150 durability pts. and 12% of sail pts. During repairs, your ship takes more damage!

repair.name: Bronze Repair Kit
repair.description: Repairs 230 durability pts. and 15% of sail pts. During repairs, your ship takes more damage!
repair.restriction: Available on ships of rate 3 and above

repair.name: Field Kit
repair.description: Assists in repairing up to 3 disabled weapons, heals 5 injured crew members, repairs 2% of durability, and extinguishes all minor fires.

group.name: Blue Signal Flare
group.description: +0.5 knot to the speed of all ships in the squadron.

group.name: Red Signal Flare
group.description: +7% to damage of all weapons of all ships in the squadron.

group.name: Yellow Signal Flare
group.description: +7% damage and +1 knot to the speed of all ships in the squadron.

group.name: Horn
group.description: Adds 5% temporary durability, which absorbs damage, for all allies in the squadron.

general.name: Large Additional Sails
general.description: Increase speed by 1.5 knots and grant a temporary dash upon activation. Sails are vulnerable while active and take twice as much damage.

general.name: Small Plates
general.description: Increase ship defense by 2.5 but decrease maneuverability by 6%.

general.name: Large Plates
general.description: Increase ship defense by 4 and speeds up extinguishing minor fires but decrease maneuverability by 10%.
general.restriction: Available on ships of rate 3 and above

general.name: Smoke Bomb
general.description: Reduces all damage by 15%, including for sails and crew. Slowly dissipates.

general.name: Smoke Screen
general.description: Reduces all damage by 25%, including for sails and crew. Disperses quickly.

general.name: Bribery
general.description: A small fee in gold can force the nearest NPS ship to join the squadron! The payment in gold is equal to the durability of the captured ship. This item is highlighted green if bribery is possible.

general.name: Black Double Powder
general.description: +2.5 to ammo penetration and +15% damage for mortars. Reloading takes 9% longer.

general.name: Red Double Powder
general.description: +25% damage for guns and mortars against structures, +30% to reload speed of swivel guns.

general.name: White Double Powder
general.description: +10 pts. for cannon and mortar range and +20% shot accuracy. Ship speed while active is reduced by 1 knot.

general.name: Rum Ration
general.description: Crew will load guns 20% faster but work slower with the sails. Ship speed will be decreased by 8%.

general.name: Filling Ration
general.description: The crew works more efficiently: Maneuverability +5%, reload speed of other items +30%, sail handling speed +10%, ammunition swap speed +30%, repair speed at sea +30%, item retrieval at sea +50%, ship speed in rowing mode increased by 1.5 knots.

general.name: Phosphorus
general.description: Enhance any ammo type with phosphorus. Increases penetration by +2 and slows enemy ships on impact. Does not stack with gunpowder and reduces the cannon's angle of fire. Cannot be canceled.

general.name: Powder Charge
general.description: Enhances any ammo type, causing it to explode and deal area damage. NPS are more vulnerable to explosions. Reduces attack range by 5% and halves penetration, but the damage is compensated by the explosion, which harms even protected ships.

general.name: Poseidon's Hook
general.description: Doubles the weapons received when sinking NPS.
